title: Modules, Packages, and Dependency Boundaries · Behavior Brief: Esm Commonjs
summary: Split the status coordinator into explicit browser modules and verify clean-environment loading and dependency behavior. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js esm commonjs increment in a modular status application with a dependency record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish ESM and CommonJS resolution and interop without mixing assumptions across runtimes.
Use dynamic import for conditional capability or measured loading needs with complete error states.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
